text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after a round of training with Mejiro
Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My pecs, my traps, my quads... I can hear all my
muscles yelling out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They want more... They want to keep this burn
going even longer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ooh yeah, I'm feeling the real burn now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure what's happening, but it sounds like
Mejiro Ryan wants to continue training.
choice_data_list: Maybe they're screaming for a break...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna turn that screaming... into an orchestra
of muscular perfection!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan, the muscle conductor, works up a
nice sweat with some extra training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You're right, I didn't even think about it that
way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sorry, guess I need to listen to my muscles more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, little buddies! Can you hear me? That's all
for today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is talking to her muscles. After some
discussion, they decide to take a break.
